calendar.matters:
Petition To Modify Trust
Off Calendar Aug-26-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Russell Stanaland in Propria Persona.

Mr. Stanaland stated that the value of the subtrusts are approximately $100,000.00 a piece, that the Parents are asking that bond be waived and that the trust instrument waives bond. The Court stated that it will allow separate subtrusts for those Beneficiaries under 25 years of age but that bond will be required for the Successor Trustees. Mr. Stanaland withdrew his petition in open court.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris. (Not Reported)
